subcodes.first_line: Lo! The Spirit hath revealed unto the Pen from the horizon of the Tongue of Eternity, saying: Write thou upon the Tablet that verily I am God, there is no God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حس اوحی الی القلم من افق لسان القدم ان اکتب علی اللوح اننی انا الله لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @justice and wrath of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the power of words; of speech
